name: Kindergarten Gymnastics & Dance — Semester 1
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for personal space, shapes, balance, levels, and rhythm. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with personal space, shapes, balance, levels, and rhythm.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about personal space, shapes, balance, levels, and rhythm through a close look at personal space, shapes, balance, levels, and rhythm.
